AI UPS™ for Data Centers | Perfect Power, Grid Stability | ON.energy
Medium-voltage AI UPS™ delivers clean power for compute + cooling, absorbs volatility, enables ride-through, and streamlines interconnection at GW scale.

AI UPS™ is deployed by the world’s leading AI and cloud operators to endure uninterrupted compute and perfect power quality. By integrating directly with grid infrastructure, it keeps data flowing, cooling online, and uptime absolute, even under extreme volatility.

Tested, certified, and deployed across leading hyperscale data centers, AI UPS™ delivers verified reliability and scalability at multi-gigawatt capacity.

{{AI workloads have outgrown}} traditional power design. AI UPS™ delivers perfect power quality inside the data hall while stabilizing the grid outside, proven at gigawatt scale with hyperscalers and utilities.

{{AI workloads exceed the limits}} of traditional data center power design. UPS and interconnection systems can’t manage their density or volatility, while concentrated demand destabilizes the grid itself, creating a two-sided power quality challenge.

MC UPS™ | Mission-Critical Power Quality at Medium Voltage | ON.energy
Outdoor, plug-and-play MC UPS™ stabilizes voltage in milliseconds—whole-site protection, fault-tolerant design, UL/NFPA aligned, grid-ready.
Deployed in some of the harshest environments, our systems are relied on by large, sophisticated operators with the highest uptime requirements.

From airports and utilities to global manufacturers and financial institutions, On.Energy technology delivers stable, uninterrupted power in complex markets and challenging operating conditions where reliability matters most.

{{Citi Banamex}} is a leading financial institution in Mexico, where continuity, security, and uptime are non-negotiable. ON deployed behind-the-meter storage to strengthen onsite resilience—supporting stable power and reliable operations through grid disturbance and downtime

{{As one of the world’s largest retailers,}} Walmart operates high-throughput facilities where power quality and peak demand shape cost and reliability. ON deployed behind-the-meter storage to shift load and provide reactive power compensation—reducing peaks and stabilizing onsite power.

{{Grupo Bimbo is a global baking leader}} running continuous, automation-driven production where downtime is expensive. ON delivered behind-the-meter storage for load shifting and UPS support—protecting critical operations while optimizing how the site uses energy.

{{At ASUR’s Ciudad Juárez airport in Mexico}} we delivered a targeted optimization project combining load shifting and reactive compensation to lower peak costs, improve power factor, and enhance overall electrical stability

{{Enel is a global energy company}} operating generation and grid-scale infrastructure where reliability is non-negotiable. ON provided front-of-the-meter storage for backup—supporting grid resilience and dependable power when it matters most.

{{For OMA (Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte)—}} an airport group that operates and manages 13 airports in Mexico with additional business lines across logistics, industrial parks, and hotels—we delivered an energy optimization project focused on load shifting and reactive power compensation to reduce peak demand exposure, improve power factor, and support more stable, efficient electrical operations

Now deployed across dozens of industrial and enterprise campuses, MC UPS™ integrates with existing medium-voltage infrastructure to deliver flickerless, full-site power protection and multi-hour storage flexibility, combining uptime and grid participation in a single system.
{{When the grid falters,}} critical infrastructure can’t. Airports, manufacturers, and defense sites depend on uninterrupted power,  yet face instability that utilities can’t fix fast enough.

{{Across industrial and infrastructure environments,}} voltage sags, flicker, and short blackouts have become routine. As grids grow more complex and renewables more variable, existing facilities must retrofit reliability into aging systems while maintaining uptime, safety, and cost control.
Uptime across active industrial, aviation, and advanced manufacturing  deployments.

Grid Volatility Solutions | Distributed Storage in ERCOT | ON.energy
Turning volatility into value with distributed battery storage—charge low, discharge high, stabilize local nodes, and deliver top-tier performance in ERCOT.

ON solves the grid’s flexibility challenge through deployment, not theory. Applying technology, regulatory know-how, and private capital to build assets that strengthen reliability and accelerate the energy transition.

{{ERCOT,}} the Texas power market, is the fastest-growing and most unpredictable in the U.S. We built one of the largest distributed storage platforms in the region to turn volatility into value and deliver reliable power where it’s needed most

{{Electric demand is rising faster than infrastructure can follow}} Thin reserves and stalled interconnections now define most power markets. Renewables are plentiful, but flexibility is scarce, and that’s where the opportunity lies.

We don’t sell one-size-fits-all boxes. We custom-architect solutions to complex power challenges — built for scale, reliability, and your unique needs.

Built from the ground up with hundreds of years of combined runtime and optimization. Designed with robust controls, advanced communications, and multiple layers of redundancy, it delivers unmatched availability while ensuring every asset is dispatched for maximum value extraction over its lifetime.

Our latest-generation DC block features 1500V liquid-cooled architecture with the highest energy densities on the market — proven in global deployments, backed by terawatt-hours of operating experience and hundreds of GWh of annual manufacturing capacity.

Transformers are a critical link in every system, enabling safe and efficient step-up and step-down of voltage. Designed for high reliability and low losses, they also provide galvanic isolation — adding an essential layer of protection and flexibility across distribution levels.

The power conversion system is the core of grid-scale performance, delivering the fastest response times, high power density, and modular, redundant design for maximum reliability. Proven at the gigawatt scale across global grids, it provides grid-forming and synthetic inertia capabilities — stabilizing networks and supporting the world’s most demanding applications.

ON.Command™ EMS is the intelligence behind every storage solution. Built on more than 150 years of combined real-world asset operations experience, it leverages proprietary algorithms to deliver superior, data-driven performance. Key capabilities include AI-powered forecasting, hardware-agnostic integration, intuitive UX design, and 24/7 remote monitoring for predictive maintenance and warranty tracking. It supports a wide range of applications, including AI UPS™ for AI factories, load shifting, peak shaving, ancillary services, microgrids, renewable integration, and carbon-footprint tracking.

{{ON.command™ is the intelligence layer behind every ON.energy deployment.}} It forecasts, dispatches, and controls energy assets in real time, ensuring maximum uptime, optimized operating costs, and seamless grid integration. Designed for reliability, it adapts and scales across any site, system architecture, or market application.

ON's ROC streams real-time operational data, orchestrates predictive maintenance, and safeguards warranty performance. With continuous monitoring, high-resolution telemetry, and rapid event response, it ensures your assets operate safely, efficiently, and at full availability.
